html:
Exclusive to:

ColdLukewarmWarmHot

“Gains heat when near something hot, and cools near something cold.

It will warm the holder depending on its temperature.

When hot, it hammers a bit more efficiently, and does extra damage towards freezing targets.

Durability is used when breaking from cooling down fully, it can be mended back into a functional state by heating it back up again.”

-

The Hotheaded Hammer is a Hammer that has an internal temperature from 0 to 90 degree. When crafted, it starts with 90 degree. Like a Thermal Stone, it can be heated up near heat sources or be cooled down near cool sources. When it is warm or hot, it can hammer with more efficientcy and emit lights. The Hotheaded Hammer passively heats the holder. Each hammering or attack transfers a small amount of heat from it to the wielder, which can cause Overheating.

Stage Temperature Bonus Efficiency
Cold ≤ 20 1x
Lukewarm 20–40 1x
Warm 40–60 1.25x
Hot > 60 1.5x

The Hotheaded Hammer does not lose durability from use. Instead, it loses 25% durability when it becomes too cold. When the temperature drops below 0 degree, the Hotheaded Hammer becomes "broken" state and cannot be equipped. It can be repaired by heating it up to above 60 degree before it can be used again.

The Hotheaded Hammer does extra damage towards freezing targets, up to double damage towards targets not frozen solid, and triple damage against a target that's frozen solid.

Stage Freezing Frozen
Cold / Lukewarm 1× 1×
Warm 1.25× 1.5×
Hot 2× 3×

Trivia

  • The Hotheaded Hammer was called the "Thermic Hammer" during the beta.
  • The Hotheaded Hammer is added in Cursed Confrontation Part 1 update.

Assets

  • Stage 4
  • Stage 3
  • Stage 2
  • Cooled Down
  • Broken
  • Reheating
  • Stage 4
  • Stage 3
  • Stage 2
  • Cooled Down

Exclusive to:
ColdLukewarmWarmHot
“It's cold and brittle.”
–Wilson
“It's not looking so good...”
–Willow
“Is cracking apart.”
–Wolfgang
“It's not long for this world...”
–Wendy
“WARNING: LOSING STRUCTURAL INTEGRITY”
–WX-78
“It may require repairs soon.”
–Wickerbottom
“Looks like it's aboot to break apart.”
–Woodie
“It won't hold together much longer.”
–Maxwell
“It shall nöt weather much further use.”
–Wigfrid
“Uh-oh... is it gonna break?”
–Webber
“It's beginning to crumble.”
–Warly
“Going to break!”
–Wormwood
“It's lookin' a little flimsy.”
–Winona
“The cracks are beginning to show, hyuyu!”
–Wortox
“It gonna break, florp!”
–Wurt
“Uh oh. Looks like it's about to break...”
–Walter
“Its time is nearly up.”
–Wanda
“I think it's losing steam.”
–Wilson
“Awwwww, where did all that beautiful heat go?”
–Willow
“Is cooled off now.”
–Wolfgang
“It has lost the warmth it once had.”
–Wendy
“HEAT OUTPUT: NEGLIGIBLE”
–WX-78
“Its temperature has diminished significantly.”
–Wickerbottom
“Fizzled out, eh?”
–Woodie
“Without heat, it's hardly different from an ordinary hammer.”
–Maxwell
“The fire burns löw within it.”
–Wigfrid
“Aww, where did the heat go?”
–Webber
“It's getting cold.”
–Warly
“No more warm?”
–Wormwood
“It's coolin' off.”
–Winona
“What's the harm? It's barely warm!”
–Wortox
“Hey! How come not warm anymore?”
–Wurt
“It's barely warm.”
–Walter
“It's barely warm.”
–Wanda
“It's all warmed up!”
–Wilson
“I'm never using any other hammer ever again.”
–Willow
“Is good at keeping Wolfgang nice and warm.”
–Wolfgang
“I can find some small comfort in its warmth.”
–Wendy
“A HAMMER AND A HEATER. I RESPECT A MULTITASKER”
–WX-78
“It keeps its user comfortably warm while working.”
–Wickerbottom
“It's like wearin' a cozy pair of long johns while I work.”
–Woodie
“If I must do physical labor, I can at least do it in relative comfort.”
–Maxwell
“It öffers respite fröm the cöld.”
–Wigfrid
“It keeps us warm while we do our chores.”
–Webber
“It keeps my hands pleasantly warm.”
–Warly
“Warm smasher”
–Wormwood
“Nothin' warms you up like some hard work.”
–Winona
“It keeps the cold from taking hold.”
–Wortox
“So warm! Gimme!”
–Wurt
“It'll keep me warm while I hammer things!”
–Walter
“It makes the work nice and cozy.”
–Wanda
“It's a hot commodity.”
–Wilson
“I like my tools scalding hot.”
–Willow
“Hot hammer make Wolfgang feel the burn!”
–Wolfgang
“The hottest flames burn out the quickest...”
–Wendy
“SUPERHEATED FOR MAXIMUM EFFICIENCY”
–WX-78
“It helps perform tasks quickly, if one can withstand the heat.”
–Wickerbottom
“It's hot, but it gets the job done fast.”
–Woodie
“I despise working up a sweat...”
–Maxwell
“It still bears the heat öf the förge!”
–Wigfrid
“It singes the hairs on our fingies!”
–Webber
“It's a hammer, served hot!”
–Warly
“Ah! Hot!!”
–Wormwood
“Anybody got some safety gloves?”
–Winona
“Its heat can't be beat.”
–Wortox
“It good smasher, but hurt claws!”
–Wurt
“Wow, I can feel the heat from here!”
–Walter
“Incredibly hot, but wonderfully efficient!”
–Wanda

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Búa Nóng là loại Búa có nhiệt độ bên trong từ 0 đến 90 độ. Khi chế tạo, nó bắt đầu với 90 độ. Giống như Đá Nhiệt, nó có thể được làm nóng lên gần nguồn nhiệt hoặc được hạ nhiệt gần nguồn mát. Khi ấm hoặc nóng, nó có thể đập mạnh hơn và phát ra ánh sáng. Búa Nóng làm nóng phần giữ một cách thụ động. Mỗi cú đập hoặc đòn tấn công sẽ truyền một lượng nhiệt nhỏ từ nó sang người sử dụng, điều này có thể gây ra Quá nóng.
